title: Court Message Evidence Map
problem: people preparing text-message evidence for court need trauma-aware evidence selection, chain-of-custody clarity, and lawyer-reviewable summaries without hallucinated claims.
direction: A local evidence map that ingests synthetic SMS/WhatsApp exports, clusters incidents, cites every claim to message IDs, detects coercive-pattern evidence, and emits a lawyer-ready review packet.
why: Dispute Buddy is already about replacing screenshots with court-ready message evidence. The project pushes into citation-locked analysis and review workflow, which is exactly where trust matters.
